subprocess_flow.description: Establish clear, measurable metrics to evaluate AI model performance. This involves identifying key performance indicators (KPIs) that align with business objectives and user needs. The metrics should cover aspects such as accuracy, efficiency, accessibility, and fairness. Document the chosen metrics and their rationale for future reference and consistency.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To establish a clear basis for evaluating AI model performance.
subprocess_flow.scope: All relevant aspects of AI model performance.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Consult stakeholders to ensure metrics align with business goals.

subprocess_flow.description: Gather data related to the defined performance metrics from various sources. This includes collecting service usage data, user feedback, and system logs. Ensure data collection methods are reliable and consistent. Implement automated data collection processes where possible to minimize manual effort and ensure timely data availability. Data should be stored securely and in compliance with data privacy regulations.
success_criteria: Data is collected from all relevant sources
Data collection is automated where possible
subprocess_flow.purpose: To gather the necessary data for evaluating AI model performance.
subprocess_flow.scope: All relevant data sources and channels.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Implement data backup and recovery procedures.

subprocess_flow.description: Analyze the collected performance data to identify trends, patterns, and anomalies. This involves using statistical analysis and data visualization techniques to gain insights into AI model performance. Compare current performance against established benchmarks and targets. Investigate any deviations from expected performance levels to understand the underlying causes. Ensure the analysis is objective and unbiased.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To gain insights into AI model performance and identify areas for improvement.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Use objective analysis techniques and involve multiple analysts.

subprocess_flow.description: Collect user feedback through various channels, such as surveys, interviews, and feedback forms. This involves actively soliciting feedback from end-users regarding their experience with the AI-powered service. Analyze the feedback to identify common themes and areas of concern. Ensure feedback is representative of the diverse user base. Implement mechanisms to address user concerns and suggestions.
success_criteria: Feedback is collected from diverse users
Common themes and concerns are identified
Mechanisms are in place to address feedback
subprocess_flow.purpose: To understand user experience and identify areas for improvement.
subprocess_flow.scope: All relevant users and feedback channels.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Use diverse feedback channels and actively solicit feedback from underrepresented users.

subprocess_flow.description: Create comprehensive performance reports that summarize the analysis of performance data and user feedback. These reports should include key metrics, trends, anomalies, and user concerns. Present the information in a clear and concise manner, using visualizations where appropriate. Distribute the reports to relevant stakeholders, such as process owners, AI specialists, and management. Ensure the reports are accurate and timely.
success_criteria: Reports are distributed to relevant stakeholders
subprocess_flow.purpose: To communicate AI model performance and user feedback to stakeholders.
subprocess_flow.scope: All relevant performance data and user feedback.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Validate data and analysis before generating reports.

subprocess_flow.description: Based on the performance reports and user feedback, identify opportunities for improving the AI model and service. This involves analyzing the root causes of performance issues and user concerns. Prioritize improvement opportunities based on their potential impact and feasibility. Document the identified opportunities and their rationale for future reference. Ensure the improvement opportunities align with business objectives and user needs.
success_criteria: Opportunities are prioritized based on impact and feasibility
subprocess_flow.purpose: To identify areas for improving the AI model and service.
subprocess_flow.scope: All relevant aspects of AI model performance and user experience.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Involve multiple stakeholders in the identification process.
